title: Campfire Cracking
description: Allows stone-like blocks to be cracked, unpolished, or de-infested via campfire
body:
This datapack allows you to do the following with campfires:
- Break down cobble into gravel
- Unpolish (roughen) stones (works with full blocks, stairs, and slabs)
- Crack bricks
- Cobble stone and deepslate
- ...and unchisel sandstone

Currently, there is no mod support, however this is planned. 

Check out the gallery for fancy recipe screenshots, thanks EMI!
